{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=After losing massive energy following consumption by the Star Destroyer, it ultimately fused with its Snail Shell and stabilized in near-physical form.
|affct=ART
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=9901
|relic1=Solar Sail
|relic2=Mystic Mountain
|relic3=Hevelius Chart
|relic4=Pillars of Creation
|relic5=Sparkler Award
}}
|color=orange
|earth=11
|water=10
|fire=11
|wind=10
|form=Dragon
|element=Earth
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=HP
}}
